abilities.name: Counterspell
abilities.text: Enemy models within 6" must each discard a card to declare triggers during opposed duels.

abilities.name: Drawn to Power
abilities.text: After resolving an attack against this model, it may drain a (soulstone). If it does, place it into base contact with a Strategy marker within 6".

abilities.name: Goad Witchling
abilities.text: When an allied minion activates within 6", move it up to 4".

actions.name: Witched Blade
actions.costs_and_restrictions: For each raise this action receives, this model may declare one additional different trigger, ignoring suits.

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Drain Magic
triggers.text: Target discards a card. This model may draw a card and then discard a card.

actions.name: Immolate
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this action receives a raise, this model may remove a Burning token from the target to deal +3 damage.

actions.name: Break the Seal
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Target a friendly engaged Witchling Stalker. Replace the target with a Witchling Thrall. It heals 3.
